response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff-level engineer with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, his resume lacks the core requirements for this role. He has no demonstrated experience with Kotlin, the Spring ecosystem, or enterprise JVM frameworks, which are strictly required for developing enterprise IDE tooling in the Java/Kotlin ecosystem.
strengths: Proven track record at top-tier tech companies (Stripe, Shopify) at the Staff and Senior levels.
Demonstrated interest in developer tooling, having built test runners, assertion libraries, and code generators.
Previous experience working on IDE internals, specifically C/C++ components for NI LabWindows/CVI.
concerns: Severe lack of recent and deep experience with Java and JVM internals.
Zero mentioned experience with Kotlin, Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate.
Primary technical stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) does not align with the Java/Kotlin focus of the role.
